name: Mi Bank
description_short: Mi BANK is a Michigan-based business bank offering personal and business banking services with personalized banker relationships and state-of-the-art technology.
description_long:
Mi BANK positions itself as a relationship-driven alternative to large national banks that prioritize scaling and profitability over customer knowledge. The bank was created specifically to address the disconnect that occurs when banking decisions become centralized and impersonal. Founded on the principle that customers benefit from working with a dedicated banker rather than navigating multiple delivery channels, Mi BANK emphasizes deep local expertise and customized solutions for Michigan businesses and individuals.

The bank offers comprehensive banking services including personal checking and savings accounts, business banking solutions, mortgages with closing cost assistance, credit cards, money transfer capabilities, and specialized lending products. They provide SBA loans tailored to business needs, a specific nonprofit banking offering to help organizations tell their stories, and the Mi ENTREPRENEUR program supporting Michigan business owners. All accounts are FDIC-insured and backed by the full faith and credit of the U.S. Government, with mobile banking access available for account management from smartphones.

Mi BANK differentiates itself through its commitment to local Michigan banking expertise developed over decades, assignment of a single dedicated banker per customer, integration of personal service with modern technology, and a stated focus on understanding customers' unique challenges. Leadership emphasizes that their success is driven by bankers who leverage technology while maintaining superior personal service. The company actively supports community segments including nonprofits and entrepreneurs through specialized programs.

As a regional bank, Mi BANK serves primarily Michigan-based customers and businesses. While the emphasis on personalized service and local expertise is genuine, customers should note that as a smaller institution, they may not offer the same breadth of products or geographic reach as national banks. The website content focuses heavily on business banking, suggesting that personal banking customers may receive secondary emphasis. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Mortgage loans with up to $1,750 closing cost coverage
Credit cards with enhanced digital experience
pros: FDIC-insured deposits with full U.S. Government backing
Dedicated single banker assigned to each customer for personalized service
Up to $1,750 in closing cost coverage on mortgage purchase and refinance transactions
Secure smartphone-based account access and mobile banking
Specialized SBA loan programs tailored to business needs
Specific nonprofit banking offering designed to support mission-driven organizations
Decades of localized Michigan banking expertise and community relationships
Integration of state-of-the-art technology with personal banker service
cons: Regional bank limited primarily to Michigan, lacking national branch network or geographic reach
No mention of specific interest rates, APYs, or fee structures on website
Emphasis on business banking may mean personal banking services receive less focus or innovation
Limited transparency about specific loan products, terms, or eligibility requirements online
Smaller institution may have fewer product offerings compared to national competitors

contact.address: 3707 W Maple Rd, Bloomfield Township, MI 48301

best_for: Michigan-based small business owners seeking personalized banking relationships and SBA loans
Entrepreneurs in Michigan looking for specialized support through the Mi ENTREPRENEUR program
Nonprofit organizations needing banking services designed for mission-driven institutions
Michigan residents and businesses valuing local expertise and relationship-based banking over large-scale institutions
diagnosis: Mi BANK is best for Michigan-based business owners, entrepreneurs, and nonprofits who prioritize personalized banking relationships and local expertise over national reach and product breadth. The main caveat is that as a regional bank with emphasis on business services, personal banking customers may find limited product innovation and scope compared to larger institutions, and the bank's geographic limitation to Michigan excludes customers outside the state.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
address: 3707 W Maple Rd, Bloomfield Township, MI 48301
meta_description: Mi BANK is a Michigan-based business bank offering personal and business banking with personalized relationships.
